steps.name: Phase 0: Foundry Migration & Compilation
steps.description: Convert Hardhat project to Foundry and ensure successful compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/scouting-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the scouting-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will migrate the project to Foundry (if needed) and verify compilation artifacts are generated successfully.

steps.name: Compilation Check Decision
steps.description: Check if COMPILATION_FAILED.md exists to determine if workflow should stop

steps.name: Phase 1: Contract Analysis & Scaffolding Preparation
steps.description: Identify contracts for invariant testing and prepare scaffolding requirements
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/scouting-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the scouting-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

decision.NOTE: Contracts to scaffold file created, continue to setting up fuzzing
Contracts to scaffold file not found, retry analysis

steps.name: Generate Recon Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate fuzzing scaffolding based on contracts-to-scaffold.json
